data: {"generalSituation":"A southerly airstream will bring hot weather to the coast of Guangdong persistently in the next couple of days. Meanwhile, an anticyclone aloft will cover the northern part of the South China Sea and the coast of southern China. The weather will be mainly fine over the region. With the weakening of the anticyclone aloft and under the influence of a trough of low pressure, there will be a few showers over the coast of southern China and thunderstorms over inland areas towards the weekend.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260414","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"South force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods.
